task_name: Search for 'FSU College of Business' on Google, access the Florida State University College of Business website, and navigate to the 'Networking Events' page under 'Alumni & Friends'. task_name: Search for the latest English news articles about Sean Kelly using Google Chrome. Bookmark the Cyclingnews article titled 'Paris-Roubaix 2025 - Date, race route, history - your ultimate guide to the Hell of the North' and verify the bookmark is saved under 'Other bookmarks'. Create a new bookmarks folder named 'Sean Kelly & Classics' in Google Chrome, then move the 'Paris-Roubaix 2025' bookmark into this folder. Next, find and bookmark a separate article detailing Sean Kelly's victories at Paris-Roubaix and save it in the 'Sean Kelly & Classics' folder.
